unit: plan (multi-plan phase; entries below are PLANS, not tasks within one plan)

principles.md (Ch.2)

blockers.workaround: add the word 'definition' as own-framing (label the 'What refactoring is' section as the definition); own-words, no oracle re-review; fix before the 07-10 full-battery gate; then write 07-03-SUMMARY

human_actions_pending.action: If a future leaf's oracle-reviewer returns error because the source lacks that entry, flag to owner to add its Markdown to .oracle/
human_actions_pending.context: owner provisions .oracle/ chapters; already added Return Modified Value to Ch.11

decisions.decision: Orchestrator drives content plans INLINE (NOT via gsd-executor subagents)
decisions.rationale: the clean-room loop needs the Agent tool (spawn oracle/oracle-reviewer) and AskUserQuestion (owner escalation); gsd-executor has neither

decisions.decision: Chapter-by-chapter cadence with a PAUSE after each chapter for owner review
decisions.rationale: owner preference from the pilot checkpoint

decisions.decision: Oracle-reviewer rubric SHARPENED (3 anchors): (1) mechanics scores cross-ref aptness; (2) our principles/sibling back-edges are benign additions, not invented limits; (3) spirit->spirit/judgment
decisions.rationale: surfaced by Ch.6-10 rounds; owner-approved; agent-reviewed (firewall SAFE, consistency CLEAN); reloaded; first used on Ch.11

decisions.decision: Targeted subset (18 leaves) for the Ch.6-10 back-review, not a full re-gate
decisions.rationale: only #1 (aptness) + #3 (judgment) opened coverage gaps; #2 only relaxes so cannot hide a defect; scoped to non-inverse cross-links + judgment-flavored leaves

decisions.decision: Fixed the botched `@ ` commit-subject prefix on the 6 session commits via rebase; switched idiom to git commit -F <file>
decisions.rationale: git commit -m @'...'@ in Git Bash prepended a literal @ line (single-quote closed early on apostrophes); rebase strip verified content-identical

decisions.decision: Split Phase [web-example] DROPPED; Return Modified Value [web-only] is the sole provenance marker (Ch.11, gate-able)
decisions.rationale: owner adjudication; cut relics stay cut (4 relics out of the 62)

next_action: Working tree clean; catalog 51/62. FIRST re-run the targeted delta re-review (see .continue-here.md 'Targeted delta re-review'): spawn 3 oracle-reviewer agents (Ch.6 subset=5; Ch.7+8 subset=8; Ch.9+10 subset=5), each scoped to ONLY cross-ref aptness + spirit/judgment with the sharpened anchors; revise any flagged leaf BLIND, re-gate, commit fixes. THEN /gsd-execute-phase 7 -> 07-09 (Ch.12, 11 leaves) via the calibrated clean-room loop (sub-batch ~6+5), then 07-10 (Wave 4) + the 07-03 fix, then phase close.
context_notes: Oracle agents are LIVE + RELOADED with the sharpened rubric. The 3 delta-review agents from the prior session were stopped mid-source-read (no verdicts) -- re-run from scratch. FIREWALL (blocking): main context NEVER reads .oracle/ (ls for names only); only the oracle/oracle-reviewer subagents read it. Wave-3 chapter plans are FILE-DISJOINT: author ONLY the chapter's leaf files; do NOT touch README.md or checker .mjs (07-10 owns those; check-catalog mirror + check-crossrefs are RED-by-design until 07-10). Distinct example domains/identifiers (never the source's) to avoid too_close_to_source. Ch.12 is judgment-heavy (delegation vs inheritance) -- expect spirit/judgment to matter. Commit via git commit -F <msgfile> (NOT -m @'...'@).
